name: Trint
description: AI transcription/translation with REST API and SDKs; enterprise-grade STT.

seo.title: Trint — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Trint: AI transcription/translation with REST API and SDKs; enterprise-grade STT.

when_to_use: Transcribing interviews and podcasts with AI-powered accuracy
Editing and exporting video transcripts with timestamped segments
Collaborating on transcript editing and highlight tagging as a team
Building content repurposing workflows from video to written content

cons: Feature pace slower than new entrants
review.verdict: Still a safe enterprise STT pick, but Deepgram and AssemblyAI now rival it at lower cost.
review.best_for: Media and enterprise teams wanting an editor-first transcription workflow
review.not_for: Cost-sensitive developers who are fine running Whisper or cheaper STT APIs
